name: @kiwe/ai-toolkit
description: AI toolkit for creating Kiwe website, AppShell theme, and combined handoffs without reading the full plugin codebase.

scripts.test: node --check bin/kiwe.js && node --check lib/kiwe-core.js && node --check lib/binding-validator.js && node --check lib/apply-planner.js && node --check lib/framework-profile-validator.js && node --check mcp/index.js && node bin/kiwe.js workflow > tmp/workflow-smoke.md && node bin/kiwe.js route --command "/rebuild /seamframework" --brief "Smoke" > tmp/route-smoke.md && node tools/validate-output.cjs --help && node tools/audit-output.cjs --help && node tools/validate-bindings.cjs --help && node tools/prepare-apply-plan.cjs --help && node tools/validate-framework-profile.cjs --help && node tools/validate-bindings.cjs fixtures/bindings-valid --site-graph fixtures/bindings-valid/site-graph.json && node tools/prepare-apply-plan.cjs fixtures/bindings-valid --site-graph fixtures/bindings-valid/site-graph.json && node tools/validate-framework-profile.cjs fixtures/framework-profile-valid
